title: L2.8 Execution Kernel - Rebalance Cycle Schema
description: Defines the idempotent data structure for translating Policy intents into atomic exchange actions.

cycle_id.description: Unique UUID for this execution loop.

intent_hash.description: Hash of the Policy Kernel's Target Exposure. Used for idempotency.

settled_positions.description: Actual physical balances and derivative positions retrieved from exchange.

executable_inflight_long.description: Discounted sum of buy orders (e.g. submitted=0.5x, confirmed=1.0x)

cancel_stale_orders.description: List of order IDs that are incompatible with the current intent (wrong side, wrong price bound, wrong version).

place_new_orders.description: New orders strictly based on: Diff = Target - EffectivePosition (only if Diff > Minimum_Trade_Size).
